messages.content: i was there but may be we were not destined to meet. I am at 22 camac st we can catch up any time u r on this side, my no is 9903800354. Also sent u a sms. I am happy that you enjoyed the program. As a follow up u can watch the live webcast of Ra on the following link http://www.infinitheism.com/satsang-webcast.html every sunday from 7 AM to 9 AM. I am in midst of the webcast right now.

share.share_text: Infinipath has become a popular instrument of transformation and growth for hundreds of thousands of seekers across the globe. The reach through technology has immensely benefited many and they revere this weekly mentorship sessions with Mahatria. These growth sessions discuss every aspect of life;....
